reviews.review_description: This game is absolutely BUNS… It had nothing but grass and walls around it. The map looked HORRIBLE and there wasn’t even a model. All you do is wall climb the walls and that’s pretty much it. Worst game I downloaded, and the game icon looked better than the game itself. Horrible game and wished I never downloaded it.
